title: AL's Scorpions & Crabs x Fresh Animations
description: A pack that makes AL's Scorpions & Crabs compatible with Fresh Animations by Fresh_LX!
body:
![Scorpions & Crabs logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d0b2517b774ac4384c43fd2f189559c4cf5df69c.png)

# 

This pack makes AL's Scorpions & Crabs compatible with Fresh Animations by Fresh_LX!

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/jSTOYt4Rt8s" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

 

Since AL's Scorpions & Crabs uses custom models, on it's own, it is incompatible with Fresh Animations.

This addon pack fixes that with new models that use the appropriate animations!

 

Important:

In order for this pack to work, you need to load it above FA.

This pack also has built-in compatibility with the official [Fresh Animations Extensions](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations-extensions), specifically the FA+Spider Edit!

 

Load them in order:

-FA+Extensions (optional)

-This Pack

-Fresh Animations
